description: A heatwave is causing record electricity demand. An operator must prevent a blackout by balancing the grid.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge a 'Grid Strain' alert as demand approaches maximum capacity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the critical grid condition.

nodes.task_description: Activate a demand response program, sending requests to large commercial buildings to reduce their consumption.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers the demand response event.

nodes.task_description: Increase power generation from the city's battery storage facility to meet the remaining demand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully brings the battery storage system online.
